title: Mailing Bags, iSOUL 50 Pcs Shipping Poly Postal Self Seal Bags in Size 6 x 9 Inch Size Small Mailing Bags Postage Packaging Bags 152mm to 229mm
features: This iSOUL Opaque Mailing bags incorporate a permanent self-seal closure and are made from an opaque 60-micron film. Our posting bags self-adhesive strong closure, water and dirt resistant air sealed bags made for Secure the inside and outside.

Safe and Secure Package Bags for Clothes or Packaging: These plastic mailers have a sticky strip for easy closure. Once sealed, these bags are very hard to open allowing your items to arrive safely without risk of opening or tampering.

Plastic envelopes for posting: iSOUL Large postage bags are very light weight and sturdy. You can use its full size or put something smaller inside and wrap the excess before sealing. Postage Bags for clothes , Books, and more

This Plastic Postage Bags are can be use in any Courier or sealed Airtight storage Purpose, you will get these bags in five different sizes for any size packing material, with the self-seal lip make the parcel air tight and water resistant for personal and business use.
We Have Small to Large Mailing bags with the size of 6 x 9 Inch / 9 x 12 Inch / 10 x 14 Inch / 12 x 16 / 17 x 24 / 24 x 36 Inch. Parcel bags for posting Mailing Packaging and more.
